title: The Gold-Bug
author: Edgar Allan Poe

beats.name: beat_1
beats.desc: The protagonist is bitten by a bug, marking his initiation.

beats.name: beat_2
beats.desc: He deciphers the bug's code leading to treasure.

beats.name: beat_3
beats.desc: He successfully locates the treasure map.

beats.name: beat_5
beats.desc: The climax involves a desperate chase for the treasure.

beats.name: beat_6
beats.desc: The treasure is found, but the protagonist's sanity is lost.

summary: A man bitten by a bug embarks on a treasure hunt, blending reality and obsession in a chilling narrative.
